meaning: 斯诺登峰[英国威尔士西北部](海拔1085米)
examples: Snowdon and the mountains beyond were covered in snow.
Professional photographer Lord Snowdon won its Hood Medal in 1978.
Professional photographer Lord Snowdon won its Hood 1 Medal in 1978.
An RAF rescue helicopter from Valley, Anglesey, winched three men from Northumberland from Snowdon's Pyg Track.
Crib y Ddysgl is a narrow ridge not far from the 3, 560ft (1, 085m) summit of Snowdon.
